use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions on websites with expandable answers
Creating collapsible content sections for help documentation
Organizing FAQ pages with smooth open/close animations
Building product feature explanations with show/hide functionality
ai_summary: A clean, accessible FAQ accordion component built with Radix UI primitives. Features smooth expand/collapse animations with chevron rotation indicator and hover states. Minimalist styling with a border-bottom separator makes it suitable for various websites and applications requiring collapsible question-answer content.
